name: Toshi Ranbo
text:
This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.
Characters played from this province enter play with 1 additional fate on them.

name: Scene of the Crime
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – look at your opponent's hand.

name: Gateway to Meido
text:
Cannot be a stronghold province.
During a conflict at this province, you may play characters from your dynasty discard pile into the conflict as if they were in your hand.

name: Hiruma Signaller
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, sacrifice this character and choose a character you control – ready that character and move it to the conflict.

name: Fifth Tower Watch
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
Interrupt: When you sacrifice a character, choose an opponent. That opponent must choose a character he or she controls with lower [mil] skill than the sacrificed character – bow that character.

name: Sententious Poet
text: Reaction: After your opponent spends fate to play a card during a conflict in which this character is participating – gain 1 fate.

name: Esteemed Tea House
text: Action: During a conflict in which you control a participating Courtier, choose an attachment on a participating character – return that attachment to its owner's hand. That player cannot play copies of that card until the end of the phase.

name: Magistrate of Reason
text: As an additional cost for your opponent to trigger a character ability during a conflict in which this character is attacking, that opponent must spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring.

name: Akodo Zentarō
text:
Disguised Bushi.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, choose a non-unique holding in the attacked province – gain control of that holding and move it to one of your unbroken non-stronghold provinces, if able, discarding each other card in that province. Otherwise, discard it.

name: Shiba Sophist
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for a card that shares a Trait with an element of the contested ring, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.

name: Shameless Gossip
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose two characters controlled by the same player – move one status token from one of those characters to the other.

name: Shinjo Kyōra
text:
Disguised Cavalry.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – switch the contested ring with a ring in the unclaimed ring pool. (The attacking player gains all fate on that ring. Retain the ring's conflict type.)

name: Hantei Sotorii
text:
Pride.
Action: During a [mil] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character — that character gets +3 glory until the end of the conflict.

name: Give No Ground
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a defending character you control – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +2[mil] and cannot have its skills reduced. (This includes by attachments, lasting effects, and status tokens.)

name: Moment of Perfect Beauty
text: Action: During a conflict, if you control more honored participating characters than your opponent – after your opponent's next action opportunity, resolve the conflict as if both players passed consecutively.

name: Greater Understanding
text:
Attach to a ring.
Reaction: After fate is placed on attached ring – resolve that ring's effects as if you were the attacking player.

name: Blade of 10,000 Battles
text:
Attach to a unique character you control. Limited. Restricted.
Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent, choose a card in your conflict discard pile – add that card to your hand.

name: Command Respect
text: Action: During a conflict, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent – as an additional cost for your opponent to play an event during this conflict, that opponent must give you 1 honor. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Purity of Spirit
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Bushi character – honor that character. At the end of the conflict, discard any status tokens on it.

name: False Loyalties
text: Reaction: After an opponent wins a conflict, if he or she is more honorable than you, choose a participating character that opponent controls and a character in that opponent's home – switch those character's locations.

name: Adorned Barcha
text:
Attach to a unique character you control. Limited. Restricted.
Action: During a [mil] conflict in which attached character is not participating, choose a participating character – bow that character and move attached character to the conflict.

name: A Perfect Cut
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a participating Bushi character – that character gets +2 [mil] until the end of the conflict. If it wins the conflict, honor it.
